title: Advanced Python Architecture
author: Ethan Cole
description: A deep dive into scalable Python system design and clean architecture patterns.

title: Building APIs with FastAPI
author: Lena Hoffman
description: Learn how to design high-performance REST APIs using FastAPI and async programming.

title: Distributed Systems in Practice
author: Marco Alvarez
description: Covers real-world distributed system challenges including consistency and fault tolerance.

title: The Mathematics of Machine Learning
author: Sophia Turner
description: An intuitive yet rigorous introduction to linear algebra, calculus, and probability in ML.

title: History of Ancient Civilizations
author: Daniel Brooks
description: Explores the rise and fall of early human civilizations with a modern analytical perspective.

title: Introduction to Algorithms and Complexity
author: Nathan Reed
description: A practical guide to algorithmic thinking, complexity analysis, and problem-solving strategies.
